seoTitle: Terms of Service | Palm & Light Coffee
seoDescription: Review the terms that govern use of the Palm & Light Coffee website and related services.
title: Terms of Service
intro: These Terms of Service govern access to and use of our website and digital content. By using this site, you agree to these terms.

sections.title: Use of the Website
sections.body1: You may use this website for lawful personal or business purposes related to learning about Palm & Light Coffee services and offerings.
sections.body2: You agree not to misuse the site, interfere with its operation, or attempt unauthorized access to systems or data.

sections.title: Content and Intellectual Property
sections.body1: All text, design, graphics, logos, photos, and other content on this site are owned by Palm & Light Coffee or used with permission.
sections.body2: You may not copy, reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without prior written consent, except where allowed by law.

sections.title: Orders, Services, and Availability
sections.body1: Menu items, pricing, hours, and service availability may change at any time without notice.
sections.body2: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue offerings and to refuse service where permitted by law.

sections.title: Third-Party Links
sections.body1: This website may include links to third-party sites such as maps, social platforms, or payment services for convenience.
sections.body2: We are not responsible for third-party content, policies, or practices, and you access those services at your own discretion.

sections.title: Disclaimers
sections.body1: The website and its content are provided on an “as is” and “as available” basis without warranties of any kind, to the extent permitted by law.
sections.body2: We do not guarantee uninterrupted access, error-free operation, or that the site will always be free from harmful components.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.body1: To the maximum extent permitted by law, Palm & Light Coffee is not liable for indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from site use.
sections.body2: Where liability cannot be excluded, it is limited to the minimum extent allowed under applicable law.

sections.title: Changes to These Terms
sections.body1: We may update these terms from time to time. Changes become effective when posted on this page with a revised date.
sections.body2: Continued use of the website after updates means you accept the updated terms.

contact.title: Questions About These Terms
contact.body: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us.
